Video.summary: Uncover the truth about the Achaemenid Persian Empire: an "empire of information."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Persian Empire
Video.title: Rethinking the Persian Empire

Video.summary: In this episode, explore how we\'ve come to know the Persian Empire.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Persian Empire
Video.title: Questioning the Sources

Video.summary: Here, take a tour of the ancient world before the Persian Empire.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Persian Empire
Video.title: The World before Cyrus

Video.summary: Learn how Cyrus expanded the empire through pragmatic leadership.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Persian Empire
Video.title: Cyrus and Cambyses - Founders of the Empire

Image.alt: Cyrus and Cambyses - Founders of the Empire
Cyrus and Cambyses - Founders of the Empire
Cyrus and Cambyses - Founders of the Empire

Video.summary: Witness the first challenge to the new empire: Was the son-in-law of Cyrus a legitimate king?
Video.grandparentTitle: The Persian Empire
Video.title: Darius I - Creator of the Imperial System

Image.alt: Darius I - Creator of the Imperial System
Darius I - Creator of the Imperial System
Darius I - Creator of the Imperial System

Video.summary: Tour the five Persian capitals: Pasargadae, Ecbatana, Babylon, Susa, and Persepolis.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Persian Empire
Video.title: Persian Capitals and Royal Palaces

Video.summary: Explore the range of nations and cultures that define the Greater Middle East.
Video.grandparentTitle: Turning Points in Middle Eastern History
Video.title: Muslim Empires: Land, Language, Religion

Video.summary: Trace key phases in the life of Muhammad, and analyze their reverberations today.
Video.grandparentTitle: Turning Points in Middle Eastern History
Video.title: Muhammad and the Dawn of Islam - 622

Image.alt: Muhammad and the Dawn of Islam - 622
Muhammad and the Dawn of Islam - 622
Muhammad and the Dawn of Islam - 622

Video.summary: Follow the Arab armies of the new Islamic empire in their conquest of territories.
Video.grandparentTitle: Turning Points in Middle Eastern History
Video.title: Arab Invasion of North Africa - 639

Video.summary: Trace the shift from a religiously inspired Islamic empire to a politically oriented one.
Video.grandparentTitle: Turning Points in Middle Eastern History
Video.title: Umayyad Caliphate in Damascus - 661

Video.summary: See how Western imperialism, the politics of oil, and the push for a Jewish state all set the stage for the 20th century.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Middle East in the 20th Century
Video.title: A Middle East Crossroads in the Year 1990

Image.alt: A Middle East Crossroads in the Year 1990
A Middle East Crossroads in the Year 1990
A Middle East Crossroads in the Year 1990

Video.summary: Look at how protests in Persia led to a new government. Then meet the Young Turks who wanted a united Turkey to supersede the Ottoman Empire.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Middle East in the 20th Century
Video.title: Constitutional Revolts in Persia and Turkey

Image.alt: Constitutional Revolts in Persia and Turkey
Constitutional Revolts in Persia and Turkey
Constitutional Revolts in Persia and Turkey

Video.summary: Western imperialism, the politics of oil, and the push for a Jewish state set the stage for the 20th century.

Video.title: World War I and the Ottoman Empire's Fall

World War I and the Ottoman Empire's Fall

Video.summary: Study the fallout from World War I with a look at the Turkish War of Independence in 1919.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Middle East in the 20th Century
Video.title: Egyptian Revolution and Turkish Independence

Video.summary: Examine the monarchies in the Middle East and North Africa in the period between the World Wars.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Middle East in the 20th Century
Video.title: Monarchies of the 20th-Century Middle East

Video.summary: Examine the monarchies in the Middle East and North Africa in the period between the World Wars.

Video.summary: Octavian, after the Battle of Actium, soon achieves one-man rule over Rome.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Roman Empire: From Augustus to the Fall of Rome
Video.title: Dawn of the Roman Empire

Video.summary: Learn how Octavian\'s political innovations are astonishing historical feats.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Roman Empire: From Augustus to the Fall of Rome
Video.title: Augustus, the First Emperor

Video.summary: Follow the debacle of Roman leadership under Tiberius and Caligula.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Roman Empire: From Augustus to the Fall of Rome
Video.title: Tiberius and Caligula

Video.summary: Trace the strange and bloody stories of the rule of Claudius and Nero.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Roman Empire: From Augustus to the Fall of Rome
Video.title: Claudius and Nero

Video.summary: How did Rome become so powerful?
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rise of Rome
Video.title: The City on the Tiber

Video.summary: The rise of Rome begins with a monarchy.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rise of Rome
Video.title: The Monarchy and the Etruscans

Video.summary: Tales and literature from early Rome give us only partial insight into factual history.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rise of Rome
Video.title: Roman Values and Heroes

Video.summary: Witness the transition from the monarchy to the republic.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rise of Rome
Video.title: The Early Republic and Rural Life
